originalBehavior: The opening similar-triangles scene keeps four scaled right triangles synchronized as readers drag the angle around the unit circle, updating side labels and sine/cosine ratios together.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published MainCtrl state and similar-triangles directive, including shared angle updates, side labels, and the ratio equations for every triangle size.
notes: The shared opts.pos state still drives both the introductory triangle view and the later linked-coordinate sandbox.
The public route only wraps the visualization for narrower screens.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still renders a similar-triangles custom element ahead of the autoplay sections.
Smoke coverage updates opts.pos locally and checks the triangle labels and linked-coordinate markers move together.

originalBehavior: The sine autoplay panel expands a moving unit-circle sample into a plotted sine wave, then returns the play surface to its ready state when the sequence finishes.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published SineAnimationCtrl and trig-transform directive, including the play-button event flow, moving unit marker, staged axis expansion, and sine path render.
notes: The live page ships a single play control for this section rather than separate pause or reset buttons.
No autoplay timings were refactored for v1.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still nests trig-transform func="sine" inside ev-play-button under SineAnimationCtrl.
Smoke coverage triggers the local play button, waits for the sine path to render, and checks the controller returns to its ready state.

originalBehavior: The cosine autoplay panel repeats the same staged transform for cosine, rotating the geometry and revealing the cosine wave over angle.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published CosineAnimationCtrl and trig-transform directive, including the rotated cosine expansion and play-state lifecycle.
notes: The cosine section remains independent from the sine autoplay panel, matching the published page structure.
The local route preserves the original controller names and broadcast events.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still renders trig-transform func="cosine" inside a separate CosineAnimationCtrl section.
Smoke coverage triggers the local cosine panel and checks the cosine path appears.

originalBehavior: The linked-coordinate section synchronizes the polar point, sine plot, and cosine plot while readers drag between Cartesian and angular controls.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published linked-coordinates directive, including the shared point state, polar arc, sine and cosine trace arms, and hover rotation on the cosine panel.
notes: The live page couples this sandbox to the body-level opts.pos state rather than a new controller-local model.
Responsive wrappers only affect overflow and do not alter the coordinate logic.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still renders linked-coordinates as the final interactive surface.
Smoke coverage updates the shared point locally and checks the polar, sine, and cosine markers all move.

originalBehavior: The Taylor-series section renders display math between the autoplay panels and the linked-coordinate sandbox.
localStatus: The local route keeps the published formula block and tex2jax configuration while loading MathJax from a local vendor copy instead of the retired remote CDN.
notes: The local route points at MathJax 2.7.9 packaged under the EV shared asset tree.
This is the only new shared dependency layer introduced in this batch.
evidence: Live source verified 2026-03-14 still points at cdn.mathjax.org with inline tex2jax config.
Smoke coverage waits for the local MathJax display render and verifies no external asset is required at runtime.

originalBehavior: The published page included EV branding, creator bylines, share widgets, newsletter prompts, analytics, and comments around the explainer.
localStatus: The local route removes those public-shell elements and uses the shared footer as the only original-page reference surface.
notes: Technical provenance remains in docs only.
The top menu now routes back to the local replica index.
evidence: Public-surface auditing blocks creator promo, EV branding, share widgets, newsletter embeds, analytics, and comments from shipping routes.
The local page keeps a single shared-footer reference link to the live original.
